name: Baize
primary_sources: Histories of ale and beer brewing in England

visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Typically covers large surfaces like tables

domain_specific_visual.Gaming_table_cover: Used on billiard and gaming tables

domain_specific_functional.Rolling_resistance: Increases rolling resistance for billiard balls
domain_specific_functional.Nap_effects: Used in snooker for nap effects

relationships.description: Bay is a similar material but lighter and with a shorter nap

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Associated with gaming and domestic service
